references.raw_text: Nicolas Courtois: Algebraic Complexity Reduction and Cryptanalysis of GOST, 17 February 2011, 28 pages, original preprint submitted to Crypto 2011. MD5 Hash is d1e272a75601405d156618176cf98218. SHA-1 Hash is 6C16C46E 00AFD74B 3ED4949B 7766D5BF 6EC7DDBB. The fastest attack on full-round 256-bit GOST presented in this paper has a time complexity of 2<sup>216</sup>. The paper also contained one nearly-practical attack on a well-known practical variant of GOST which allows to break some keys in practice. Many more important attacks were added later, current version has 54 pages, to be published soon, probably wil be split in several pieces.
references.title: Algebraic Complexity Reduction and Cryptanalysis of GOST
references.note: 28 pages, MD5 Hash: d1e272a75601405d156618176cf98218, SHA-1 Hash: 6C16C46E 00AFD74B 3ED4949B 7766D5BF 6EC7DDBB, time complexity: 2^216

references.title: Russian reference implementation of GOST in OpenSSL
